hypothesis: Add days_since_release feature using fast vectorized computation. days_since_release = number of days since first non-zero sale for each item. Uses pivot + cumsum trick to avoid slow groupby rolling. Captures item maturity and helps model distinguish new vs established items. Previous attempt (exp_0061) scored 0.95563 — investigating if the feature computation was correct. This run uses a cleaner vectorized approach. Also adding zero_streak from exp_0056 (0.94509) to combine both features. All other settings match best run (exp_0044, WRMSSE=0.94391).
